overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic open-world game showing a character in Western attire walking along a tropical coastal path. The character travels from an inland grassy area with a wooden shack toward a rocky cliff overlooking the ocean, with palm trees and dense vegetation throughout.

scene_state.functional_zone: tropical grassland path approaching wooden shack

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path toward a wooden shack surrounded by tall palm trees

entered.detail: weathered wooden building with a sloped roof situated beside the path
tall coconut palms scattered throughout the grassy landscape
narrow brown dirt trail winding through the tall grass
dense green tropical grass flanking both sides of the path
old wooden wagon or cart parked near the shack

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a dirt trail through dense tropical grassland. A weathered wooden shack appears ahead on the right, surrounded by tall palm trees under a partly cloudy sky. The path is narrow and winding, with an old wooden cart visible near the building.

events.description: passes the wooden shack and continues along the winding coastal path
ocean becomes visible in the distance as the path curves toward the coastline

agents.ego_description: walking past the shack and following the path as it curves left toward the coastline

entered.detail: rustic wooden fence running parallel to the path
blue ocean visible in the distance beyond the grassland
white rocky outcrops along the distant shore

segments.scene_description: The character passes the wooden shack and continues along the trail. A wooden fence appears on the right side of the path. As the trail curves, the ocean becomes visible in the distance, with white rocky outcrops marking the coastline. The palm trees now line both sides of the path.

events.description: path runs parallel to the coastline with clear views of the ocean and rocky formations

agents.ego_description: walking along the elevated coastal path with the ocean visible to the left and palm trees overhead

entered.detail: massive white boulders and rock clusters along the cliff edge

segments.scene_description: The trail now runs along the coastline with the ocean clearly visible to the left. Large white rock formations dominate the shoreline, and the path winds through dense vegetation. The wooden fence falls behind as the character continues along the elevated coastal route.

events.description: character slows and stops at the cliff edge to overlook the ocean below

agents.ego_description: approaching the cliff edge and stopping to look down at the waves crashing against the rocks below

entered.detail: steep drop-off at the edge of the path overlooking the water

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the cliff edge where the path meets a steep drop-off overlooking the ocean. The rocky coastline is now directly below, with waves visible against the white rocks. The character stops at the edge to observe the view, surrounded by palm trees and dense coastal vegetation.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a secluded inland trail that gradually opens up to a dramatic coastal cliffside. It begins with the character walking along a narrow dirt path through dense tropical grassland, passing a weathered wooden shack and an old cart nestled among tall palm trees. As the character moves past the building, a wooden fence appears along the trail which curves to reveal the first glimpses of white rocky outcrops and the distant ocean. The scene then shifts as the path runs directly along the shoreline, with the fence falling away and the view expanding to show large white rock formations and crashing waves to the left. Finally, the camera follows the character to the very edge of a steep cliff, where they stop to overlook the vast ocean and the rugged coastline below.
